matching_rule: One base case matches when a promoter or gene-body variant is visible in the current sample. Three additional case families match when the whitelist mean beta, the gene-name-related mean beta, or the all-numeric mean beta resolves to low, medium, or high methylation. Variant prediction rules receive the decoded sample GT, zygosity, ALT dosage, and site REF -> ALT definition; curated allele rules take precedence only when the sample genotype carries the relevant allele dosage.
disclaimer: Predictive theses in this database are literature-guided research summaries derived from the bundled gene interpretation bundle. They are designed for exploratory synthesis in the UI and should not be treated as diagnostic or therapeutic claims.
seeded_markers: KCNQ1 long-QT model (KCNQ1 IKs channelopathy model)
concrete_variant_prediction: The variant observed in this sample suggests a KCNQ1 potassium-channel review thesis: the individual may carry context relevant to cardiac repolarization, IKs potassium current, beta-cell electrophysiology, imprinting-region context, and channel pharmacology and Long-QT syndrome review context, Cardiac repolarization biology. Treat this as pathway triage until the exact allele has external classification and phenotype support.

variant_prediction_rules.prediction: GT-confirmed KCNQ1 long-QT model dosage suggests this sample carries the KCNQ1 prediction context described by the gene-level thesis. The variant observed in this sample suggests a KCNQ1 potassium-channel review thesis: the individual may carry context relevant to cardiac repolarization, IKs potassium current, beta-cell electrophysiology, imprinting-region context, and channel pharmacology and Long-QT syndrome review context, Cardiac repolarization biology. Treat this as pathway triage until the exact allele has external classification and phenotype support. This specific marker is curated as KCNQ1 IKs channelopathy model. KCNQ1 long-QT model is curated as a KCNQ1 marker for Long-QT syndrome review context, Cardiac repolarization biology. Read it through genotype dosage, phenotype context, and the cardiac repolarization, IKs potassium current, beta-cell electrophysiology, imprinting-region context, and channel pharmacology pathway rather than as a stand-alone deterministic result.
variant_prediction_rules.sample_change_template: This sample matched KCNQ1 long-QT model at site definition {change} with GT {gt_raw} decoded as {genotype} ({zygosity}). Anchor the KCNQ1 prediction to genotype dosage {allele_dosage} rather than REF -> ALT presence alone. Dosage-specific conclusions should be softened when GT, depth, balance, or genotype quality are uncertain.
variant_prediction_rules.basis: Can modify or tag cardiac repolarization, IKs potassium current, beta-cell electrophysiology, imprinting-region context, and channel pharmacology.

methylation_sources.label: Whitelist mean beta
methylation_sources.description: Uses the curated whitelist probes stored in the interpretation database for the current gene.

methylation_sources.label: Gene-name-related mean beta
methylation_sources.description: Uses rows whose gene annotation explicitly names the current gene.

methylation_sources.label: All numeric-row mean beta

cases.label: Gene variant found
cases.prediction: The variant observed in this sample suggests a KCNQ1 potassium-channel review thesis: the individual may carry context relevant to cardiac repolarization, IKs potassium current, beta-cell electrophysiology, imprinting-region context, and channel pharmacology and Long-QT syndrome review context, Cardiac repolarization biology. Treat this as pathway triage until the exact allele has external classification and phenotype support. An observed KCNQ1 variant places this sample in the curated KCNQ1 research context. The local KCNQ1 bundle is potassium-channel review oriented. Interpret markers through exact allele class, zygosity, ancestry, phenotype, and assay context rather than as stand-alone deterministic calls. KCNQ1 variants can alter or tag cardiac repolarization, IKs potassium current, beta-cell electrophysiology, imprinting-region context, and channel pharmacology; effect direction depends on allele class, tissue, dosage, and biological context.
cases.rationale: This is the base thesis that activates as soon as any promoter or gene-body variant is visible in the current sample.

cases.label: Gene variant found + high whitelist mean beta
cases.prediction: When a KCNQ1 variant is paired with high methylation in the whitelist mean beta, the sample best fits a combined regulatory-context thesis. This pattern leans toward stronger regulatory restraint or reduced local accessibility around the locus. The variant side of the thesis is: The variant observed in this sample suggests a KCNQ1 potassium-channel review thesis: the individual may carry context relevant to cardiac repolarization, IKs potassium current, beta-cell electrophysiology, imprinting-region context, and channel pharmacology and Long-QT syndrome review context, Cardiac repolarization biology. KCNQ1 methylation should be treated as local regulatory context around a cardiac repolarization, IKs potassium current, beta-cell electrophysiology, imprinting-region context, and channel pharmacology gene. The local KCNQ1 bundle is potassium-channel review oriented.
